race.comment: VIA VEGAS (2) led for the judge last start when resuming in the Country Championship qualifier over this course and distance but capitulated. Finds a far easier assignment today and his second-up record is sound. Everything points towards a much better run. SAVVYROCKER (3) was always behind the eight-ball after missing the kick last time out over 1250m at Taree. Down in class, draws a lovely gate, and is well in after Hull's claim so she gets the right conditions for a return to form. THE LUPERCAL (1) stormed home to get up for third when resuming over 1010m at Coffs Harbour recently. Won here in a similar race to this by over three lengths carrying 0.5kgs more last prep. Poses a serious threat. WANJINA ROSE (5) won four times earlier on in her prep then most recently finished second beaten 0.7 lengths at Coffs Harbour over 1212m. Include in exotics.
